title: Fuel spillage from a truck carrying flammable liquid
description: GARDEN ROUTE NEWS - Garden Route District...
bodyText:
GARDEN ROUTE NEWS - Garden Route District Municipality Firefighters are currently attending to a fuel spillage from a truck carrying flammable liquid on the Robinson Pass in Mossel Bay.


> One lane remains open to facilitate traffic flow. Temporary closure will however occur as the truck is being hooked on the towing truck.


It is anticipated that the spillage will be cleared in one hour, by approximately 12:00.

There is a delay currently with removing the truck, due to weight constraints. An additional towing truck has been called upon to assist.

Please contact the GRDM Emergency Call Centre at 044 805 5071 or send a WhatsApp message to 081 709 5193 for any disaster-related incidents.

Photos: Supplied

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
